mapper.update:
update file_storage_db.sys_user
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_storage_capacity = #{totalStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT},
used_storage_capacity = #{usedStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update file_storage_db.sys_user set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_storage_capacity = #{totalStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, used_storage_capacity = #{usedStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

insert into file_storage_db.sys_user (username, `password`, nickname, total_storage_capacity, used_storage_capacity, `status`, create_time, update_time) values
(#{item.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.totalStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.usedStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into file_storage_db.sys_user (username, `password`, nickname, total_storage_capacity, used_storage_capacity, `status`, create_time, update_time) values
(#{item.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.totalStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.usedStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
on duplicate key update username=values(username), `password`=values(`password`), nickname=values(nickname), total_storage_capacity=values(total_storage_capacity), used_storage_capacity=values(used_storage_capacity), `status`=values(`status`), create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time)

delete from file_storage_db.sys_user where id in
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
update file_storage_db.sys_user
username = #{item.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{item.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{item.nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_storage_capacity = #{item.totalStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT},
used_storage_capacity = #{item.usedStorageCapacity,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
